action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 4 got safe_follow_steps=48.58 with ang=-K*angle, but iteration 5 regressed to 1.48 after changing sign and adding depth avoidance. Iteration 6 had eval error due to truncated predict.py. Iteration 7 had JSON parse error. Analysis: The calibration logic in predict.py was INVERTED - when positive ang increases angle, sign should be -1 (not +1). The old code used moved_toward_zero which gave wrong sign when initial_angle<0. Also predict.py was truncated causing eval failure. Decision: Write complete predict.py with FIXED calibration logic (if angle_delta>0: sign=-1, else sign=1), improved collision/stuck recovery that turns toward human, and submit eval immediately.
